suggestions.reason: Review this package script before granting command execution authority.
suggestions.snippet:
[intents.suggest_package_test]
status = "unknown"
description = "Review package script: test."
reason = "Candidate discovered from package.json; review timeout, cwd, writes, network, destructive behavior, and whether agents may run it."
agent_action = "do_not_guess_report_missing"

next_steps: Review each suggested unknown intent before copying it into .mustflow/config/commands.toml.
Do not add execution fields until a maintainer has reviewed the command behavior.

main.trigger: TypeScript source, declarations, tsconfig, package exports, module resolution, public API, compiler-version behavior, TypeScript 6-to-7 migration surfaces, native preview tooling, or TypeScript tests are created or changed

use_when: Scan TypeScript or JavaScript files for symbol headers before reading large source files chunk by chunk.
Read only the resolved symbol range or an explicit bounded line range after a code outline identifies the relevant line.
Check exact text budgets for docs, package metadata, prompts, release notes, or user-facing copy.
Check candidate edit paths before changing files that may be generated, ignored, protected, vendor, or cache output.
